description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image, with a before_script that runs `bundle install --path vendor` and caches the `vendor/` directory. Define a variable PAGES_REPO_NWO set to aurorafw/aurora. Add a deploy stage containing a pages job that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public/`, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Configure the job for GitLab Pages deployment.
